originalBehavior: Readers drag 2D sample points and the page immediately recomputes the PCA basis, projected coordinates, and axis overlays.
localStatus: The local route keeps the original draggable nobs, PCA recomputation flow, and mirrored original-vs-PCA plots unchanged.
notes: The original Angular scope still owns the sample list, derived PCA state, and redraw broadcasts.
Only asset paths and surrounding page chrome were patched for local hosting.
evidence: Live source verified 2026-03-14 still renders the draggable 2D scatter alongside the PCA output plot.
Smoke coverage drags a point and waits for both the sample coordinates and projected PCA coordinates to change.

originalBehavior: The 3D section initializes a Three.js point cloud, supports trackball rotation of the projected view, and exposes Show PCA and reset controls.
localStatus: The local route keeps the original Three.js viewer, orthographic trackball controls, overlay canvas, and PCA/reset camera flows.
notes: The page still uses the published shader snippets and projection overlay logic.
Shared EV scripts were extended locally with the route's required Three.js dependencies.
evidence: The published page still includes Show PCA and reset buttons wired to the 3D directive.
Smoke coverage checks that the overlay canvas changes after Show PCA, after manual camera drag, and after reset.

originalBehavior: The UK-food walkthrough shows the 17D source table plus fixed 1D and 2D PCA projections with country labels and axis labels.
localStatus: The local route keeps the original DEFRA table and both projection views, including the fixed country labels and PC1/PC2 annotations.
notes: The live page exposes fixed defra-d1 and defra-d2 projections rather than a component-pair switcher, so the replica mirrors that exact surface.
Responsive wrapper styles were added around the wide table and plots without changing the plot math.
evidence: Live source verified 2026-03-14 renders a single DEFRA table, one 1D PCA plot, and one 2D PCA plot with no switching controls.
Smoke coverage verifies the table rectangles, four country labels, and both projection plots render together.

originalBehavior: The published page included EV branding, author bylines, share widgets, newsletter prompts, analytics, and comments around the explainer.
localStatus: The local route removes those public-shell elements and uses the shared footer as the only live original-page reference surface.
notes: Technical provenance stays in docs only.
The public menu now routes back to the local replica index.
evidence: Public-surface auditing blocks creator names, EV branding, share widgets, newsletter embeds, analytics, and comments from shipping pages.
The local page keeps a single shared-footer reference link to the live original.
